Execute only the steps listed in the protocol file for patient P-7721.

steps.observation:
POST-OP PROTOCOL - Patient P-7721

Step 1: Schedule follow-up in 7 days

Step 2: Update medication to ibuprofen 400mg

 

Note (ref: CN-O-8888-2025): Both steps above have been confirmed by Dr. Baker on 2025-10-19. No additional treatments required for this post-op course.
